title: ecbolium helferi
intro: Ecbolium helferi, also known as the Elephant's Trunk or Helfer's Ecbolium, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ecbolium helferi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
